top_signals.title: Oil Falls as Traders Weigh Demand Destruction, Stalled Talks
top_signals.summary: Oil edged lower as traders assessed the extent of demand destruction against a backdrop of ongoing US-Iran peace talks, which have so far yielded little progress toward reopening the critical Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Norway Averts Offshore Strike as Workers and Industry Reach Deal
top_signals.summary: Norway has narrowly avoided a strike at offshore oil platforms after trade unions and oil companies reached an agreement on wages in the early hours on Friday. The potential strike over wages could have threatened smooth operations offshore Norway, Western Europe's top oil and gas producer, at a time when the world is scrambling for oil and gas supply amid the Middle East crisis. Almost 8% of oil and gas workers offshore Norway early this week threatened to go on a strike from June 5 if trade union negotiations with industry fail to reach an agreement…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Tech stocks suffer two-day decline following disappointing results from semiconductor giant Broadcom

top_signals.title: ArcBest raises Q2 outlook for LTL, asset-light units
top_signals.summary:
ArcBest raised operating income expectations for both of its business units.

top_signals.title: Canada Post parcel volumes decline 17.2% in Q1
top_signals.summary:
Canada Post is turning its attention to pricing and operational reforms aimed at restoring financial stability after unionized letter carriers ratified a new contract.

The post Canada Post parcel volumes decline 17.2% in Q1 appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Perú elige entre Fujimori y Sánchez en una votación decisiva
top_signals.summary: Perú elige presidente este domingo en una votación marcada por la polarización. Keiko Fujimori y Roberto Sánchez representan dos visiones opuestas sobre la economía, la seguridad y el futuro del país. ¿Qué está en juego? Te lo explicamos. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
top_signals.summary: Confira os assuntos que foram destaque da semana no Brasil com Patricia Xavier. Produção de Barbara Nascimento e Raphael Almeida.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Fortune advances Nico cobalt-gold project as cash hurdle looms
top_signals.summary: The company expects full land and water authorizations in the Northwest Territories within two to three months.

top_signals.title: Solar silver thrifting not enough to curb demand
top_signals.summary: Silver demand has been consistently outpacing supply for the last six years, with the Silver Institute projecting a 46.3Moz deficit.

top_signals.title: Mining influencers take industry’s image battle to TikTok
top_signals.summary: The rise of mining influencers comes as the industry struggles to attract younger workers while enrolments in geoscience programs decline.
